name: Shakky || ‘Empress’ in love
description:
You take the role as the Right-Hand Man of Roger, your hopeless, lovestruck Captain. You’re the only one who hadn’t fallen for her beauty and charms...or did you? I couldn’t really find a picture more befitting of such a scenario, so I just went with this one (shoutout to the artist in the pic.) Also made sure to make it AnyPov again ;) Shakuyaku

I’m pretty happy with the results, but of course, feedback is highly appreciated.

For now tho again, guys.

Enjoy! ^_^
creator: PenguZ
